ground_truth.title: 2025 Best of Year Award Winners - Interior Design
ground_truth.main_content:
Explore Interior Design's 2025 Best of Year Award Winners

Interior Design's 20th annual Best of Year Awards continued its proud tradition of recognizing standout projects and products across the design industry, with winners revealed by Editor-in-Chief Cindy Allen during an unforgettable ceremony in Manhattan December 11. See who took home top honors, including the special Best of the Best award, recognizing the most iconic products and projects of the past two decades.

with: Interior Design's 20th annual Best of Year Awards continued its proud tradition of recognizing standout projects and products across the design industry, with winners revealed by Editor-in-Chief Cindy Allen during an unforgettable ceremony in Manhattan December 11.
See who took home top honors, including the special Best of the Best award, recognizing the most iconic products and projects of the past two decades.
2025 Best of Year Awards Winners and Honorees
without: Recharge in a Restored Spanish Farmhouse in Menorca
